name: Razorpay Payment Observability — Metrics, Health & Info
scenario: Razorpay's on-call team is flying blind — no metrics on payment success rates, latency, or gateway health. Add Micrometer metrics to the payment service so the team can see exactly what's happening in production via a Prometheus-compatible endpoint.
description: Micrometer Counter + Timer + Gauge + DistributionSummary for payment flows. VisaGatewayHealthIndicator. PaymentInfoContributor. MeterRegistryCustomizer for global tags. 4 @SpringBootTest tests verifying all meters.

core.description: pom.xml: spring-boot-starter-actuator + micrometer-registry-prometheus. application.yml: expose health, metrics, prometheus. Global tags: application=razorpay-payments, environment=${profile}.

PaymentCounterService: Counter 'payments.total' with tags status (success/failure), gateway (visa/mastercard/upi), merchant_type. Methods: recordSuccess(gateway, merchantType), recordFailure(gateway, merchantType, reason).
PaymentTimerService: Timer 'payments.duration' per gateway with publishPercentiles(0.5, 0.95, 0.99). Method timePayment(gateway, Supplier<T>) wraps any callable.
PaymentGaugeService: Gauge 'payments.retry.queue.size', Gauge 'payments.in.flight' (AtomicInteger). Methods: queueAdd(), queueRemove(), startPayment(), finishPayment().
VisaGatewayHealthIndicator implements HealthIndicator: check mock ping, return Health.up() with latencyMs or Health.down() with reason. Registered as component 'visaGateway'.
@SpringBootTest (4 tests): success counter increments, timer records 1 call, gauge reflects queue size, health indicator returns UP. All 4 pass.
README: explains Counter vs Timer vs Gauge with one-line summary each. Documents the Prometheus endpoint URL and example output.

bonus.description: DistributionSummary 'payments.amount.inr' tracking payment amounts. publishPercentiles(0.5, 0.95, 0.99). Test: record 5 amounts, verify count=5.
MeterRegistryCustomizer: add region=india to ALL meters via MeterFilter.commonTags(). MeterFilter to DENY any test.* metric name. Test: verify global tag appears on all metrics.
PaymentInfoContributor: adds version, buildTime, team, apiDocs to /actuator/info. @SpringBootTest MockMvc test verifying info endpoint returns team=payments-engineering.

data_to_use:
Gateways: visa, mastercard, upi
Merchant types: ecomm, travel, food, education
Failure reasons: card_declined, insufficient_funds, gateway_timeout, invalid_card

Test payments:
  visa, ecomm, ₹999 → success
  mastercard, travel, ₹14999 → success
  upi, food, ₹299 → success
  visa, ecomm, ₹49999 → failure (gateway_timeout)
  mastercard, travel, ₹1 → failure (invalid_card)
ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. Create meters in constructor (not in request handler): call register() once, increment()/record() on every request. Low cardinality tags only: status, gateway, merchant_type are fine; paymentId, userId are NOT. Gauge takes (name, object, valueFunction): the function is called lazily each time the gauge is read. micrometer-registry-prometheus scope: runtime (not compile). Global tags in application.yml: management.metrics.tags.key=value — equivalent to MeterFilter.commonTags().
submission_instructions: GitHub push. All 4 tests pass. Include a screenshot or sample output of GET /actuator/prometheus showing payments.total_total and payments.duration_seconds metrics in the README.
tips_for_success: Register meters in constructor: Counter.builder().register() once; .increment() per event
Use registry.counter(name, tagKey, tagValue, ...): shorthand for common counters
Timer.record(Supplier<T>): returns T while recording duration — no separate timing needed
AtomicInteger for gauge: thread-safe, read by gauge function without lock
Health indicator component name: @Component("visaGateway") → appears as 'visaGateway' in /actuator/health
concepts_reinforced: Counter: monotonically increasing event counter with tags
Gauge: current value (queue size, active connections)
Low-cardinality tags: status/gateway/type are fine; IDs are not
Global tags: added to all meters via application.yml or MeterFilter
